Offering Aid: Can I help you (the NPC) with something?
Trade: Do you have wares or goods to sell?
Streetwise: Have you heard any rumors?
Interrogation: Do you know anything about a specific topic?
Eavesdropping: Listen in on a conversation.
Networking: Can you introduce me to ...?
Intimidation: Try to forcibly make an NPC do something.
Contracting: I want to hire/consult with you.
Restoration: Trying to get into their good graces.
Advisor: What would you do in ...?
Cold Call: Can you help me?
Ambush: I'm going to hurt you!
Debt Collector: You owe me!
Fan: Oh, hey, I know you!
Warning: There's trouble ahead.
Mistaken Identity: I thought you were someone else.
